     The Numbers Business Report

Midnight Sun (2018)

Theatrical Performance
Domestic Box Office $9,561,064Details
International Box Office $17,391,444
Worldwide Box Office $26,952,508
Domestic Physical Disc Sales
DVD Sales (estimated) $1,206,814
Blu-ray Sales (estimated) $541,980
Total $1,748,794
Further financial details...

Synopsis

17-year-old Katie Price has been sheltered since childhood with a life-threatening sensitivity to sunlight. Katie’s world opens up after dark when she ventures out to play her guitar for travelers. One night, she meets Charlie whom she has secretly admired for years. She hides her condition from him, and the two embark on a uniquely powerful romance.

Metrics

Opening Weekend:$4,003,993 (41.9% of total gross)
Legs:2.39 (domestic box office/biggest weekend)
Domestic Share:35.5% (domestic box office/worldwide)
Production Budget:$2,800,000 (worldwide box office is 9.6 times production budget)
Theater counts:2,173 opening theaters/2,173 max. theaters, 2.6 weeks average run per theater
Infl. Adj. Dom. BO $12,552,175

Movie Details

Domestic Releases: March 23rd, 2018 (Wide) by Global Road
International Releases: March 22nd, 2018 (Wide), released as ПОЛНОЧНОЕ СОЛНЦЕ (Russia (CIS))
March 22nd, 2018 (Wide), released as Il sole a mezzanotte - Midnight Sun (Italy)
March 23rd, 2018 (Wide) (Germany)
March 30th, 2018 (Wide), released as Vidurnakčio saulė (Lithuania)
March 30th, 2018 (Limited) (United Kingdom)
Video Release: June 5th, 2018 by Universal Home Entertainment
MPA Rating: PG-13 for some teen partying and sensuality.
(Rating bulletin 2486 (Cert #50552), 7/26/2017)
Running Time: 91 minutes
Cast, crew, or production detail: Foreign-Language Remake, Remake
Plot point: Coming of Age, Medical and Hospitals, Musicians, Romance, Secret Admirer
Social setting: High School Sports
Subgenre: Romantic Drama
Source:Original Screenplay
Genre:Drama
Production Method:Live Action
Creative Type:Contemporary Fiction
Production/Financing Companies: Mister Smith Entertainment, Rickard Pictures, Wrigley Pictures, Boies/Schiller
Production Countries: United States
Languages: English
